javascript:(function(C%2CL)%7Btypeof%20exports%3D%3D%22object%22%26%26typeof%20module%3C%22u%22%3FL(exports)%3Atypeof%20define%3D%3D%22function%22%26%26define.amd%3Fdefine(%5B%22exports%22%5D%2CL)%3A(C%3Dtypeof%20globalThis%3C%22u%22%3FglobalThis%3AC%7C%7Cself%2CL(C.Sidetation%3D%7B%7D))%7D)(this%2Cfunction(C)%7B%22use%20strict%22%3Bconst%20L%3D%60%0A%3Ahost%20%7B%0A%20%20all%3A%20initial%3B%0A%7D%0A*%20%7B%0A%20%20box-sizing%3A%20border-box%3B%0A%20%20font-family%3A%20-apple-system%2C%20BlinkMacSystemFont%2C%20%22Segoe%20UI%22%2C%20%22PingFang%20SC%22%2C%20%22Hiragino%20Sans%20GB%22%2C%20sans-serif%3B%0A%7D%0A%0A%2F*%20----%20hover%20highlight%20----%20*%2F%0A.hover-box%20%7B%0A%20%20position%3A%20fixed%3B%0A%20%20display%3A%20none%3B%0A%20%20pointer-events%3A%20none%3B%0A%20%20border%3A%201px%20dashed%20rgba(79%2C%20140%2C%20255%2C%200.9)%3B%0A%20%20background%3A%20rgba(79%2C%20140%2C%20255%2C%200.08)%3B%0A%20%20z-index%3A%201%3B%0A%7D%0A%0A%2F*%20----%20selection%20box%20%2B%20handles%20----%20*%2F%0A.sel-box%20%7B%0A%20%20position%3A%20fixed%3B%0A%20%20display%3A%20none%3B%0A%20%20pointer-events%3A%20none%3B%0A%20%20border%3A%201.5px%20solid%20%234f8cff%3B%0A%20%20z-index%3A%202%3B%0A%7D%0A.sel-label%20%7B%0A%20%20position%3A%20absolute%3B%0A%20%20top%3A%20-24px%3B%0A%20%20left%3A%20-1.5px%3B%0A%20%20padding%3A%202px%208px%3B%0A%20%20background%3A%20%234f8cff%3B%0A%20%20color%3A%20%23fff%3B%0A%20%20font-size%3A%2011px%3B%0A%20%20line-height%3A%2016px%3B%0A%20%20border-radius%3A%204px%3B%0A%20%20white-space%3A%20nowrap%3B%0A%20%20pointer-events%3A%20none%3B%0A%7D%0A.handle%20%7B%0A%20%20position%3A%20absolute%3B%0A%20%20width%3A%2010px%3B%0A%20%20height%3A%2010px%3B%0A%20%20background%3A%20%23fff%3B%0A%20%20border%3A%201.5px%20solid%20%234f8cff%3B%0A%20%20border-radius%3A%202px%3B%0A%20%20pointer-events%3A%20auto%3B%0A%7D%0A.handle%5Bdata-dir%3D%22nw%22%5D%20%7B%20top%3A%20-6px%3B%20%20left%3A%20-6px%3B%20%20cursor%3A%20nwse-resize%3B%20%7D%0A.handle%5Bdata-dir%3 %9C%AC%E5%85%83%E7%B4%A0%EF%BC%89%22%5D%2C%5B%22%E2%8C%A5%20%E7%82%B9%E5%87%BB%22%2C%22%E9%80%89%E4%B8%AD%E7%88%B6%E7%BA%A7%E5%85%83%E7%B4%A0%22%5D%2C%5B%22%E6%8B%96%E6%8B%BD%22%2C%22%E7%A7%BB%E5%8A%A8%E5%85%83%E7%B4%A0%EF%BC%88%E5%A4%9A%E9%80%89%E6%97%B6%E6%95%B4%E4%BD%93%E7%A7%BB%E5%8A%A8%EF%BC%89%EF%BC%8C%E8%87%AA%E5%8A%A8%E5%AF%B9%E9%BD%90%E5%90%B8%E9%99%84%22%5D%2C%5B%22%E6%8B%96%E6%8B%BD%E6%89%8B%E6%9F%84%20%2F%20%E2%87%A7%22%2C%22%E7%BC%A9%E6%94%BE%20%2F%20%E7%AD%89%E6%AF%94%E7%BC%A9%E6%94%BE%22%5D%2C%5B%22%E6%96%B9%E5%90%91%E9%94%AE%20%2F%20%E2%87%A7%E6%96%B9%E5%90%91%E9%94%AE%22%2C%22%E5%BE%AE%E8%B0%83%201px%20%2F%2010px%22%5D%2C%5B%22Delete%20%2F%20%E2%8C%AB%22%2C%22%E5%88%A0%E9%99%A4%E5%85%83%E7%B4%A0%22%5D%2C%5B%22%E2%8C%98Z%20%2F%20%E2%8C%98%E2%87%A7Z%22%2C%22%E6%92%A4%E9%94%80%20%2F%20%E9%87%8D%E5%81%9A%22%5D%2C%5B%22Enter%20%2F%20%E2%87%A7Enter%22%2C%22%E8%BF%9B%E5%85%A5%E5%AD%90%E7%BA%A7%20%2F%20%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%88%B6%E7%BA%A7%22%5D%2C%5B%22Tab%20%2F%20%E2%87%A7Tab%22%2C%22%E4%B8%8B%E4%B8%80%E4%B8%AA%20%2F%20%E4%B8%8A%E4%B8%80%E4%B8%AA%E5%85%84%E5%BC%9F%E5%85%83%E7%B4%A0%22%5D%2C%5B%22Esc%22%2C%22%E5%8F%96%E6%B6%88%E9%80%89%E4%B8%AD%EF%BC%8C%E5%86%8D%E6%8C%89%E9%80%80%E5%87%BA%E7%BC%96%E8%BE%91%22%5D%5D%3Bclass%20Pt%7Bconstructor(t%2Cs%2Ce%2Co%2Cr%3D!1)%7Bthis.bar%3Dt%2Cthis.panel%3Ds%2Cthis.shortcuts%3De%2Cthis.cb%3Do%2Cthis.panelOpen%3D!1%2Cthis.active%3D!1%2Cthis.records%3D%5B%5D%3Bconst%20n%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Bn.className%3D%22brand%22%2Cn.setAttribute(%22role%22%2C%22button%22)%3Bconst%20l%3Ddocument.createElement(%22span%22)%3Bl.className%3D%22brand-dot%22%2Cn.append(l%2C%22Sidetation%22)%2Ct.append(n)%2Cthis.brandEl%3Dn%2Cn.addEventListener(%22click%22%2C()%3D%3E%7Bthis.active%7C%7Cthis.cb.onToggle()%7D)%2Cn.addEventListener(%22keydown%22%2Cf%3D%3E%7B!this.active%26%26(f.key%3D%3D%3D%22Enter%22%7C%7Cf.key%3D%3D%3D%22%20%22)%26%26(f.preventDefault()%2Cthis.cb.onToggle())%7D)%3Bconst%20a%3D(f%2Cb)%3D%3E%7Bconst%20x%3Ddocum 6this.hovered.isConnected%26%26!this.selected.includes(this.hovered)%3Fthis.overlay.setHover(this.hovered.getBoundingClientRect())%3Athis.overlay.setHover(null)%2Cthis.rafId%3DrequestAnimationFrame(this.loop)%7D%2Cthis.onPointerMove%3Ds%3D%3E%7Bif(this.resize)%7Bthis.moveResize(s)%3Breturn%7Dif(this.drag)%7Bthis.moveDrag(s)%3Breturn%7Dif(this.inOverlay(s))%7Bthis.hovered%3Dnull%3Breturn%7Dthis.hovered%3Dthis.pageElementAt(s.clientX%2Cs.clientY)%7D%2Cthis.onPointerDown%3Ds%3D%3E%7Bif(this.inOverlay(s))return%3Bif(this.textEdit)%7Bif(s.composedPath().includes(this.textEdit.el))return%3Bthis.commitTextEdit()%7Dif(s.preventDefault()%2Cs.stopPropagation()%2Cs.altKey%26%26this.selected.length%3D%3D%3D1)%7Bconst%20a%3Dthis.selected%5B0%5D.parentElement%3Bthis.isSelectable(a)%26%26this.select(%5Ba%5D)%3Breturn%7Dconst%20e%3Dthis.pageElementAt(s.clientX%2Cs.clientY)%3Bif(!e)%7Bthis.select(%5B%5D)%3Breturn%7Dif(s.shiftKey)%7Bthis.toggleSelect(e)%3Breturn%7Dconst%20o%3DDate.now()%3Bif(e%3D%3D%3Dthis.lastDownTarget%26%26o-this.lastDownAt%3C400)%7Bthis.lastDownAt%3D0%2Cthis.startTextEdit(e)%3Breturn%7Dthis.lastDownAt%3Do%2Cthis.lastDownTarget%3De%3Bconst%20r%3Dthis.selected.length%3D%3D%3D1%3Fthis.selected%5B0%5D%3Anull%2Cn%3Dr!%3D%3Dnull%26%26(e%3D%3D%3Dr%7C%7Cr.contains(e))%2Cl%3Dthis.selected.length%3E1%26%26this.selected.includes(e)%3B!n%26%26!l%26%26this.select(%5Be%5D)%2Cthis.drag%3D%7Bels%3Athis.selected%2CstartX%3As.clientX%2CstartY%3As.clientY%2Citems%3Anull%2Cmoved%3A!1%2CdownTarget%3Ae%7D%7D%2Cthis.onPointerUp%3Ds%3D%3E%7Bif(this.resize)%7Bconst%20e%3Dthis.resize%3Bthis.resize%3Dnull%2Cdocument.documentElement.style.cursor%3D%22%22%2Cthis.history.commit(e.rec%2Ce.before)%3Breturn%7Dif(this.drag)%7Bconst%20e%3Dthis.drag%3Bthis.drag%3Dnull%2Cthis.overlay.setGuides(null%2Cnull)%2Cdocument.documentElement.style.cursor%3D%22%22%2Ce.moved%26%26e.items%3Fthis.history.commitBatch(e.items.map((%7Brec%3Ao%2Cbefore%3Ar%7D)%3D%3E(%7Brec%3Ao%2Cbefore%3Ar%7D)))%3Athis.selected.leng abs(r)%3EMath.abs(n)%3Fa%3Dl%2Fc%3Al%3Da*c%7Dl%3DMath.max(8%2CMath.round(l))%2Ca%3DMath.max(8%2CMath.round(a))%2Ce.dx%3Do.includes(%22w%22)%3Fs.baseDx%2B(s.startW-l)%3As.baseDx%2Ce.dy%3Do.includes(%22n%22)%3Fs.baseDy%2B(s.startH-a)%3As.baseDy%2C(e.dx!%3D%3Ds.baseDx%7C%7Ce.dy!%3D%3Ds.baseDy)%26%26(e.moved%3D!0)%2Ce.size%3D%7Bw%3Al%2Ch%3Aa%7D%2Ce.resized%3D!0%2CS(e)%7DpanelSetProps(t)%7Bif(this.selected.length!%3D%3D1)return%3Bconst%20s%3Dthis.selected%5B0%5D%3Bthis.commitTextEdit()%3Bconst%20e%3Dthis.history.ensure(s)%2Co%3Dthis.history.snapshot(e)%3Bfor(const%5Br%2Cn%5Dof%20Object.entries(t))r%20in%20e.savedProps%7C%7C(e.savedProps%5Br%5D%3Ds.style.getPropertyValue(r))%2Cn%3D%3D%3Dnull%3Fdelete%20e.props%5Br%5D%3Ae.props%5Br%5D%3Dn%3Bthis.history.commit(e%2Co%2C%7Bcoalesce%3A%60props%3A%24%7BObject.keys(t).sort().join(%22%2C%22)%7D%60%7D)%7DpanelSetSize(t%2Cs)%7Bif(this.selected.length!%3D%3D1)return%3Bthis.commitTextEdit()%3Bconst%20e%3Dthis.history.ensure(this.selected%5B0%5D)%2Co%3Dthis.history.snapshot(e)%3Bt!%3D%3Dnull%26%26(e.size.w%3DMath.max(8%2Ct))%2Cs!%3D%3Dnull%26%26(e.size.h%3DMath.max(8%2Cs))%2Ce.resized%3D!0%2Cthis.history.commit(e%2Co%2C%7Bcoalesce%3A%22size%22%7D)%7DalignSelected(t)%7Bif(this.selected.length%3C2)return%3Bconst%20s%3Dthis.selected.map(h%3D%3E(%7Brec%3Athis.history.ensure(h)%2Crect%3Ah.getBoundingClientRect()%7D))%2Ce%3Ds.map((%7Brec%3Ah%7D)%3D%3E(%7Brec%3Ah%2Cbefore%3Athis.history.snapshot(h)%7D))%2Co%3DMath.min(...s.map(h%3D%3Eh.rect.left))%2Cr%3DMath.max(...s.map(h%3D%3Eh.rect.right))%2Cn%3DMath.min(...s.map(h%3D%3Eh.rect.top))%2Cl%3DMath.max(...s.map(h%3D%3Eh.rect.bottom))%2Ca%3D(o%2Br)%2F2%2Cc%3D(n%2Bl)%2F2%3Bfor(const%7Brec%3Ah%2Crect%3Ad%7Dof%20s)%7Blet%20p%3D0%2Cf%3D0%3Bswitch(t)%7Bcase%22left%22%3Ap%3Do-d.left%3Bbreak%3Bcase%22right%22%3Ap%3Dr-d.right%3Bbreak%3Bcase%22hcenter%22%3Ap%3Da-(d.left%2Bd.width%2F2)%3Bbreak%3Bcase%22top%22%3Af%3Dn-d.top%3Bbreak%3Bcase%22bottom%22%3Af%3Dl-d.bottom%3Bbreak%3Bcase%22vcenter%22%3Af%3Dc-(d.top%2Bd.height%2F2)%3Bbreak%7D(p!%3D%3D0%7C%7Cf!%3D%3D0)%26%26(h.dx%2B%3Dp%2Ch.dy%2B%3Df%2Ch.moved%3D!0%2CS(h))%7Dthis.history.commitBatch(e)%7DdistributeSelected(t)%7Bif(this.selected.length%3C3)return%3Bconst%20s%3Dthis.selected.map(d%3D%3E(%7Brec%3Athis.history.ensure(d)%2Crect%3Ad.getBoundingClientRect()%7D))%2Ce%3Ds.map((%7Brec%3Ad%7D)%3D%3E(%7Brec%3Ad%2Cbefore%3Athis.history.snapshot(d)%7D))%2Co%3D%5B...s%5D.sort((d%2Cp)%3D%3Et%3D%3D%3D%22h%22%3Fd.rect.left-p.rect.left%3Ad.rect.top-p.rect.top)%2Cr%3Do%5B0%5D.rect%2Cn%3Do%5Bo.length-1%5D.rect%2Cl%3Dt%3D%3D%3D%22h%22%3Fn.right-r.left%3An.bottom-r.top%2Ca%3Do.reduce((d%2Cp)%3D%3Ed%2B(t%3D%3D%3D%22h%22%3Fp.rect.width%3Ap.rect.height)%2C0)%2Cc%3D(l-a)%2F(o.length-1)%3Blet%20h%3Dt%3D%3D%3D%22h%22%3Fr.left%3Ar.top%3Bfor(const%7Brec%3Ad%2Crect%3Ap%7Dof%20o)%7Bconst%20f%3Dt%3D%3D%3D%22h%22%3Fp.width%3Ap.height%2Cb%3Dt%3D%3D%3D%22h%22%3Fp.left%3Ap.top%2Cx%3Dh-b%3Bx!%3D%3D0%26%26(t%3D%3D%3D%22h%22%3Fd.dx%2B%3Dx%3Ad.dy%2B%3Dx%2Cd.moved%3D!0%2CS(d))%2Ch%2B%3Df%2Bc%7Dthis.history.commitBatch(e)%7Dcopy(t%2Cs)%7Bvar%20o%3Bconst%20e%3D()%3D%3E%7Bconst%20r%3Ddocument.createElement(%22textarea%22)%3Br.value%3Dt%2Cr.style.position%3D%22fixed%22%2Cr.style.opacity%3D%220%22%2Cdocument.body.append(r)%2Cr.select()%2Cdocument.execCommand(%22copy%22)%2Cr.remove()%2Cthis.overlay.toast(s)%7D%3B(o%3Dnavigator.clipboard)!%3Dnull%26%26o.writeText%3Fnavigator.clipboard.writeText(t).then(()%3D%3Ethis.overlay.toast(s)%2C()%3D%3Ee())%3Ae()%7Dasync%20syncToMcp()%7Bconst%20t%3DAt(this.history.all())%3Bif(t.count%3D%3D%3D0)%7Bthis.overlay.toast(%22%E6%B2%A1%E6%9C%89%E5%8F%AF%E5%90%8C%E6%AD%A5%E7%9A%84%E4%BF%AE%E6%94%B9%22)%3Breturn%7Dconst%20s%3D%60%24%7Bthis.opts.mcpEndpoint.replace(%2F%5C%2F%24%2F%2C%22%22)%7D%2Fingest%60%3Bthis.toolbar.setSyncState(%22syncing%22)%3Btry%7Bconst%20e%3Dawait%20fetch(s%2C%7Bmethod%3A%22POST%22%2Cheaders%3A%7B%22content-type%22%3A%22application%2Fjson%22%7D%2Cbody%3AJSON.stringify(t)%7D)%3Bif(!e.ok)throw%20new%20Error(%60HTTP%20%24%7Be.status%7D%60)%3Bthis.toolbar.setSyncState(%22idle%22)%2Cthis.overlay.toast(%60%E5%B7%B2%E5%90%8C%E6%AD%A5%20%24%7Bt.count%7D%20%E5%A4%84%E4%BF%AE%E6%94%B9%E5%88%B0%20MCP%60)%7Dcatch(e)%7Bthis.toolbar.setSyncState(%22idle%22)%2Cthis.overlay.toast(%60%E5%90%8C%E6%AD%A5%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9A%E6%9C%AC%E5%9C%B0%20MCP%20%E6%9C%8D%E5%8A%A1%E6%9C%AA%E5%90%AF%E5%8A%A8%EF%BC%9F(%24%7BString(e)%7D)%60)%7D%7DgetMarkdown()%7Breturn%20X(this.history.all())%7DgetCSS()%7Breturn%20Y(this.history.all())%7Dget%20isActive()%7Breturn%20this.active%7Dundo()%7Breturn%20this.history.undo()%7Dredo()%7Breturn%20this.history.redo()%7DsyncUI()%7Bthis.history.prune()%2Cthis.toolbar.update(this.active%2Cthis.history.all())%2Cthis.propsPanel.sync()%7D%7Dfunction%20jt(i)%7Breturn%20new%20rt(i)%7DC.Sidetation%3Drt%2CC.init%3Djt%2CObject.defineProperty(C%2CSymbol.toStringTag%2C%7Bvalue%3A%22Module%22%7D)%7D)%3B%0A%3B(function()%7Bvar%20s%3Dwindow.Sidetation%7C%7CglobalThis.Sidetation%3Bif(document.querySelector('%5Bdata-sidetation%5D'))%7Bconsole.log('Sidetation%20already%20injected')%3Breturn%3B%7Dwindow.__sidetation%3Ds.init(%7BautoStart%3Atrue%7D)%3Bconsole.log('Sidetation%20ready%20%E2%80%94%20%E5%B7%B2%E8%87%AA%E5%8A%A8%E8%BF%9B%E5%85%A5%E7%BC%96%E8%BE%91%E6%A8%A1%E5%BC%8F')%3B%7D)()%3B
